workload_summaries.note: CLRS stays strong under both full-trace and mixed supervision
arithmetic quickly stops needing dense full traces
search remains the clearest trace-hungry workload family
module-scale Wasm benefits from mixed supervision but still hits both supervision and architecture ceilings

claim_boundary: this eval report is a research-only supervision-density frontier over shared workloads. It remains benchmark-bound and refusal-bounded instead of widening served capability or broad learned-compute claims
summary: Supervision-density report covers 4 workloads with 3 supervision-limited cases and 2 architecture-limited cases.
